plot outline: After he and his first wife separate, journalist David Sheff (Carrell) struggles to help their teenage son (Chalamet), who goes from experimenting with drugs to becoming devastatingly addicted to methamphetamine. Directed by Felix Van Groeningen (The Broken Circle Breakdown), and based on Sheff's bestselling memoir "Beautiful Boy: A Father's Journey Through His Son's Addiction".
title: Beautiful Boy
akas: Beautiful boy, siempre serás mi hijo (Spain)
Beautiful Boy: Siempre serás mi hijo (Argentina)
